Uses of Interface
recoder.java.NamedProgramElement

Packages that use NamedProgramElement
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.java.reference
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
recoder.java.statement
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing pure statements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    NameReference
    A NameReference references an entity by its explicite name.
    interface 
    TypeReferenceInfix
    ReferencePrefix and -suffix that is admissible for outer type references.

  • Uses of NamedProgramElement in recoder.kit

    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type NamedProgramElement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(Identifier child, NamedProgramElement parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(Identifier child, NamedProgramElement parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static Identifier
    MiscKit.rename(ChangeHistory ch, NamedProgramElement namedElement, String newName)
    Deprecated.
    replaced by Transformation.replace
    static void
    MiscKit.setName(NamedProgramElement e, String name)
    Auxiliary transformation that sets the name of the specified element to the specified string, creating a proper identifier.
